arts.ttl: Match Preview: Niko Kovac Makes his BVB Coaching Debut
arts.sum: Unfortunately for BVB, he’s healthy again, and will be a big challenge for Niko Kovac to deal with on his debut. Kovac is the most experienced coach to lead BVB in years, and hopes are high that he can help right the ship of Dortmund’s struggling season and bring a sense of organization and purpose back to the club.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. VfB Stuttgart: How do they stack up?
arts.sum: "It's a new beginning for all of us." So said BVB ’s new man at the helm, Kovač, as he prepared his team for a highly tricky fixture against Stuttgart in his first game in charge of the Black-and-Yellows. Although VfB have won four of the last five against the Black-and-Yellows – including a 5-1 cruise in the reverse fixture this season – Stuttgart and Hoeneß will be wary of the Kovač effect on the home players.

arts.sum: Niko Kovac will name his first eleven as Borussia Dortmund head coach when they host Stuttgart at the Signal Iduna Park in the Bundesliga on Saturday afternoon. Two players he…

arts.sum: Sebastian Hoeneß will be without several players when his Stuttgart side play at Borussia Dortmund on Saturday afternoon as they lead their opponents by three points. Speaking at Friday’s press…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund yet to reach severance agreement with Sven Mislintat
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund announced the dismissal of technical director Sven Mislintat on Thursday but as reported by Sky Germany, they are yet to reach an agreement regarding severance pay. The 52-year-old…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. Stuttgart preview: The Niko Kovac era starts here
arts.sum: Niko Kovac will take charge of his first game as Borussia Dortmund boss when his side play host to Stuttgart in Saturday’s Bundesliga contest.
A new era begins for Borussia Dortmund as Niko Kovac will take charge of his first game as manager, with Stuttgart visiting Signal Iduna Park on Saturday. Dortmund have endured…

arts.ttl: ‘Keep an eye’: Liverpool & Man United told they can sign Jamie Gittens if one thing happens
arts.sum: It’s difficult to imagine Liverpool looking to add yet another left winger to their ranks in the next transfer window. Yet, reports indicated that the Reds have been impressed with what they’ve seen from Jamie Gittens at Borussia Dortmund this term. arts.ttl: Stuttgart could be without eight players against Dortmund
arts.sum: Sebastian Hoeness has revealed a long list of potential absentees for Saturday's trip to Dortmund.
